name: Cyndi Lauper
bio: Cyndi Lauper's catalog retains value through 1980s playlist strength, recurring sync use, and durable pop recognition.
notable_for: Distinctive pop songs that continue to travel well across nostalgia and catalog listening.
career_highlight: Her biggest singles remain highly visible across streaming and sync-led discovery.
revenue_drivers: Nostalgia playlists keep the core catalog active.
Strong pop recognition supports long-tail streaming.
Film, TV, and event-driven placements help refresh catalog value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Cyndi Lauper's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Cyndi Lauper's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
